calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Williams, Esq. 415-292-3656 for Plaintiff.
Paul Windust, Esq. 925-838-2090 of Berding Weil for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER 1944-1946-1948 GREEN STREET CONDOMINIUM's PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Grant. No opposition filed. Respondents' claim to have paid the award is not grounds to oppose entry of judgment confirming the award, which grants other relief. (See Code Civ. Proc. 1286 [if a petition is duly served and filed, the court shall confirm the award as made].)(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
